summary: Iter 13 frontend verification — all 7 targeted fixes validated end-to-end against the preview URL. 10/10 review assertions pass. No console errors across full-page scroll.

test_results_detail.1_alignment_photo_dad_graham: PASS — data-testid=alignment-photo-dad-graham img src='/assets/photos/team/jon-dad-billy-graham.webp'; figcaption contains 'Jon', 'father', 'Billy Graham' (visually uppercased via CSS; source text 'Jon’s father with Billy Graham').

test_results_detail.7_faq_answer_padding: PASS — faq-answer-0 inner div className='pt-2 pb-8 md:pb-10 pl-16 md:pl-[88px] pr-4 md:pr-16' (pt-2 present, -mt-2 absent); textContent length=442.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: TodaysCedar.jsx still carries the older lifecycle-chart section alongside the new dollar-timeline — both render together. User requested 'convert' the timeline; if the intent was replace-not-add, revisit. Otherwise both are intentional and pass the spec.
The DetailPanel max-h transition is set to 2400px when open — fine for current content but could clip if content grows. Low priority.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 iter-13 targeted fixes are verified on preview URL. 14 sections render, PDF endpoint returns 200 application/pdf, 0 console errors. If next iteration modifies TodaysCedar, Relationship, BravaProof, RoofSystem, or FAQ, re-run this suite.
